text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, March 14. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading scientific papers late tonight. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a common bottleneck. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that updating our financial spreadsheets. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Refinancing is a great leverage point. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Sleep quality is so important. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's wonderful. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I checked the recent logs for that. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that writing scripts to process image datasets. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Good focus area. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Looking over our mortgage options. First United Mortgage offered 5.65% with zero points. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Smart financial planning. A rate of 5.65% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Staying active is key. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. He is doing so well. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. CareConnect prep is moving along. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
